mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE '%' || #{username} || '%'
AND nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status, is_admin) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{isAdmin})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username = #{username}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE is_admin = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
